description.title: Terms of Sale on the Vivoolio Marketplace

item: Effective date: 25.03.2025
Platform: Vivoolio Marketplace
Legal entity:
**Contact:** privacy@vivoolio.com
1.1. These Terms of Sale ("Terms of Sale", "Terms") govern the process of purchasing goods through the Vivoolio marketplace (hereinafter referred to as the "Platform").
1.2. Vivoolio is an online marketplace providing a technical and organizational platform for the sale of goods by:

list: third-party sellers ("Sellers"), and/or the Vivoolio company itself (if indicated in the product listing as "Sold by Vivoolio").

item: 1.3. Depending on the specific product, the purchase agreement is concluded:

list: either between the Buyer and the respective Seller or between the Buyer and Vivoolio.

item: 1.4. Vivoolio acts as the marketplace operator and payment agent (merchant of record), receiving payments from Buyers and transferring funds to Sellers minus commissions and other deductions stipulated by the Platform rules.
1.5. By placing an order, the Buyer confirms their agreement with these Terms, as well as with:
**Buyer** — an individual or legal entity placing an order through the Platform.
**Seller** — a third party listing goods on the Platform.
**Product** — olive oil and related products listed for sale.
**Order** — a completed and confirmed purchase of a Product.
**Olive Coins (Bonuses)** — Vivoolio's internal bonus system.

description.title: 3. The right to place an order

item: 3.1. The Buyer confirms that:

list: they have reached the age permitted for online purchases in their country;

item: 3.2. Vivoolio has the right to refuse to process an order, suspend it, or cancel it in the event of:
4.1. Descriptions, specifications, images, and other information about the Products are provided by the Sellers or generated based on data from third parties.
4.2. Vivoolio does not guarantee the absolute accuracy of the descriptions and is not responsible for any discrepancies, unless otherwise required by applicable law.
4.3. All recommendations, including expert and AI suggestions, are for informational purposes only and do not constitute medical, dietary, or other professional advice.
5.1. Listing a product on the Platform does not constitute a public offer, unless otherwise required by applicable law.
5.2. An order is considered accepted after:

list: confirmation in the Platform interface and/or successful completion of the payment.

item: 5.3. Vivoolio has the right to cancel the order before it is handed over for delivery if price errors, item unavailability, or other objective reasons are detected.
6.1. Prices are indicated on the product page and when placing an order.
6.2. The price may not include:

list: taxes and fees applicable in the Buyer’s country.

item: 6.3. The Buyer is solely responsible for paying taxes and fees, unless otherwise provided by law.
7.1. Payment is made to Vivoolio using the available payment methods.
7.2. Vivoolio accepts payments as a payment agent and transfers funds to Sellers minus commissions.
7.3. Vivoolio does not store full payment card data of Buyers.
8.1. Delivery of the Goods is carried out directly by the Seller, unless otherwise explicitly stated in the product page.
8.2. Vivoolio is not a carrier and is not responsible for the actions of delivery services.
8.3. Delivery times are approximate.
8.4. The risk of loss or damage to the goods passes to the Buyer at the moment the goods are handed over to the carrier or received, depending on the applicable law.
9.1. The possibility of canceling an order depends on its processing stage and applicable law.
9.2. Once the item has been handed over for delivery, cancellation may not be possible.
10.1. Returns are carried out solely in **accordance with the mandatory provisions of the Buyer's country legislation.**
10.2. Vivoolio does not provide additional voluntary return guarantees.
10.3. The return of food products, including olive oil, may be restricted or impossible in accordance with local laws.
10.4. Refunds are made using the same payment method unless otherwise required by law.
11.1. Vivoolio may provide Customers with bonuses (Olive Coins).
11.2. Olive Coins:

list: can only be used to partially pay for certain products;
can cover no more than 40–50% of the product price;
are valid for 12 months from the date of accrual.

item: 11.3. Vivoolio has the right to:

list: change the rules of the bonus program;
cancel bonuses in case of returns, chargebacks, or abuse.

item: 12.1. All claims regarding orders are submitted through Vivoolio customer support.
12.2. Vivoolio has the right to act as a mediator between the Buyer and the Seller, but does not guarantee a specific outcome of the dispute.
13.1. Vivoolio is not liable for:
13.2. Vivoolio's liability is limited to the amount of the paid order, unless otherwise provided by law.
14.1. Vivoolio shall not be held liable for failure to fulfill obligations due to circumstances beyond its control.
15.1. These Terms are governed by the applicable law, taking into account the mandatory consumer protection provisions of the Buyer's country.
For any questions related to orders and returns, the Buyer can contact Vivoolio customer support:
support@vivoolio.com
